narrative:
Streetsboro City has 12,067 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.1 percentage points.
